ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiff Application For Court Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:39 am pausing at 10:12 am resuming at 10:40 am and concluding at 11:05 am.

Plaintiff M. Dattani Credit Trust is represented by Duncan MacDonald, Esq.
Defendant Nicks Brizilian Barbeque not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

KAUSHIK DETTANI is examined by the Court.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Photos(7).....................................ID/EVID

Plaintiff oraly dismisses the Doe Defendants

The Court Finds:
1. The 1st amended complaint filed May 25, 2022 is the operative pleading.
2. Defendant Claudius Oliveira was served by substitute service on April 11, 2022.
3. Defendants Leandro Ceceilio and Nick Brazilian Barbeque were served by substitute service on April 17, 2022.
4. Default Entered as to Defendants Claudius Oliveira, Leandro Ceceilio, and Nick Brazilian Barbeque on September 21, 2022.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs M. Dattani Credit Trust and Kaushik Dettani, and against Defendants Claudius Oliveira, Leandro Ceceilio, and Nick Brazilian Barbeque, as follows:

1. Damages: $213,080.04
2. Prejudgment Interest: $42,113.41
3. Costs: $957.85
4. Attorney fees: $127,312.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $383,463.80

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
